title: deadlyaccuratejobs — Universal Job Search
description: Search for any company by name, get back every open job. Auto-resolves which ATS platform(s) they use across 15 platforms.

mode.title: Mode
mode.description:
How to run:
- 'search' — Search by company name, auto-resolve ATS, scrape all jobs
- 'resolve' — Just resolve company to ATS matches (no scraping)
- 'stats' — Get platform slug counts
- 'direct' — Scrape a specific slug on a specific ATS (skip resolution)
mode.sectionDescription: Choose how you want to search.

company.title: Company Name
company.description:
Company name to search for (modes: search, resolve).

Examples: 'Stripe', 'Airbnb', 'Cloudflare', 'Figma'

slug.title: Slug (Direct Mode)
slug.description: ATS slug for direct mode. The identifier used in the ATS URL (e.g. 'stripe' for boards.greenhouse.io/stripe).

ats.title: ATS Platform (Direct Mode)
ats.description: Which ATS platform the slug belongs to (direct mode only).

remoteOnly.title: Remote Only
remoteOnly.sectionDescription: Filter results by location, keywords, seniority, etc.

locationFilter.title: Location Filter
locationFilter.description:
Regex pattern to match job locations.

Examples:
- 'europe|germany|uk|france' — European jobs
- 'remote' — Any location containing 'remote'
- 'prague|czech' — Specific city/country

keywordFilter.title: Title/Keyword Filter
keywordFilter.description:
Regex pattern to match job titles, departments, description snippets.

Examples:
- 'senior|staff|lead' — Senior roles
- 'full.?stack|fullstack' — Full-stack
- 'react|typescript|node' — Tech-specific

departmentFilter.title: Department Filter
departmentFilter.description:
Regex pattern to match departments.

Examples:
- 'engineering|product' — Tech roles
- 'sales|marketing|growth' — Go-to-market

sinceFilter.title: Since Filter
sinceFilter.description:
Only return jobs posted after this time.

Examples: '2d' (2 days), '1w' (1 week), '2026-03-10' (ISO date)

limit.title: Max Results
limit.description: Maximum number of jobs to return. 0 = no limit.

slugApiUrl.title: Slug API URL
slugApiUrl.description: Override the slug API endpoint (default: https://job-slugs.wd40.workers.dev). Advanced use only.
